issues.notes: LARCENY is a fundamental legal term but is not a headword in the live corpus. Only LARCENOUS exists. Search for 'larceny' returns 32 body matches but no headword match. Likely suppressed or missing from the original OCR extraction.
BOROUGH is referenced by BURGH entry as '(q. v.)' but is not a headword. May be a variant spelling issue or missing entry.
